complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Scope Preview to 10s Window with Background Optimization
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Orchestrator preview_range param + gen_range logic with padding; 2) BackgroundSource time-range cache keys and manifest tracking; 3) Update SDXL/AnimateDiff/Ken Burns for partial generation with time-specific keys; 4) Full render gap-filling + cache reuse logic; 5) Gradio progress updates, docs, and edge case handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multiple cross-cutting changes across orchestrator, BackgroundSource implementations (SDXL/AnimateDiff/KenBurns), cache key design for partial/full distinction, and ensuring seamless preview-to-full transition without quality loss or A/V sync issues. Dependencies on 4 prior tasks increase integration risk.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Bass-Driven Logo Beat Pulse with Low-Frequency Energy
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Extend audio_analyzer for bass RMS/envelope extraction to analysis.json; 2) Implement beat_pulse.py bass mode with smoothing and fallback to beats; 3) Add CompositorConfig pulse_mode/bass_sensitivity + Gradio UI sliders; 4) Cache implementation + docs for tuning.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity from audio signal processing (librosa RMS, low-freq filtering, envelope smoothing), integration with existing beat grid fallback, UI config exposure, and perceptual validation (kick alignment vs hi-hat jitter). Requires precise energy correlation testing.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Define durable job spec schema + JSON/JSONL serialization from OrchestratorInputs; 2) CLI batch runner with sequential orchestrate_full_render and error isolation; 3) Per-job asset copying + stable output paths; 4) Gradio queue UI with background worker/threading.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high due to robust job persistence, error recovery (job N failure doesn't corrupt N-1), stable paths for uploads, Gradio threading for UI responsiveness, and overnight reliability. Balances CLI simplicity with optional UI complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Single primary export action in Gradio (full pipeline UX)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Add prominent Gradio Export button wired to orchestrate_full_render with conditional lyrics alignment; 2) Update UI copy/docs to emphasize one-button flow vs optional precache steps.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low complexity as it leverages existing orchestrate_full_render chain. Primarily UI reorganization and documentation clarity rather than new logic. Minimal risk of breaking existing multi-step flows.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Timestamped section headers for lyrics alignment
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Enhance lyrics_aligner parser for timestamped header grammar + section_labels dict; 2) Ensure backward compatibility, cache key stability for legacy formats; 3) Integrate header timestamps into forced_sec/DP scoring + optional JSON persistence.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity from regex/time parsing for flexible header formats ([Verse 1: 0:12] vs [0:12 Verse 1]), maintaining full backward compatibility, cache hash stability, and precise DP integration (score 2.0 dominance). Strong test coverage mitigates parser risks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Create comprehensive pytest coverage for Tasks 24-28 (masks, multi-color, beat modulation, determinism, A/B testing) + technical documentation on behavior/controls + index.md entry.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-moderate as documentation/testing tasks have predictable scope. Complexity from ensuring complete coverage of prior rim lights implementation details and prose consistency with existing technical docs.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Define EffectKind Enum, EffectClip dataclass, EffectsTimeline class; 2) Implement load/save with atomic writes, pydantic/manual validation, and JSON roundtrip.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate from establishing foundational data model with validation, atomic file ops, and strict schema enforcement. Sets up correctness for entire effects system but straightforward dataclass/Enum implementation.
Low complexity: simple function extraction/refactoring with type hints/docstrings. Primarily mechanical changes with clear identical-output testing.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Implement deterministic shake_offset(t) using glitch_seed_for_time pattern, active clip detection, settings scaling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-moderate: straightforward time-based offset generation with deterministic seeding and clip interval logic. Matches established patterns.
Low: simple interpolation-based mix factor over active clips. Minimal logic beyond interval weighting.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Implement ease-in-out zoom curve peaking during clip intervals per settings.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-moderate: requires smooth curve math (ease functions) and bilinear resize compatibility.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) load_editor_state with peaks/duration/ghost_events; save_edited_timeline validation; 2) bake_auto_schedule with deduping vs existing clips.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate from state orchestration (peaks from shared helper), validation, dir-based song_hash extraction, and deduping logic (±20ms tolerance).

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) CompositorConfig effects_timeline + _build_frame_effects_context; 2) Define fixed effect application order in _render_compositor_frame; 3) Master auto_reactivity scaling + main branch compatibility.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity from frame pipeline integration, maintaining identical output for empty timelines (regression risk), fixed effect ordering, and fast per-frame callables.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) build_editor_html scaffolding mirroring lyrics editor; 2) Waveform canvas + 7 effect rows with color-coding; 3) Drag/resize/multi-select/rubber-band/zoom JS; 4) Per-clip settings panels + ghost markers/master slider.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity for custom vanilla JS timeline UI (waveform, drag/resize, multi-select, settings binding). Mirrors proven lyrics editor but 7x complexity from multiple rows + ghosts.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Add gr.Tab with HTML editor, hidden state Textbox, Load/Save/Bake/Clear buttons wired to handlers mirroring lyrics tab.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-moderate: standard Gradio tab wiring following exact lyrics editor pattern.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Update OrchestratorInputs with effects_timeline_enabled/auto_reactivity_master defaults; load effects_timeline.json; pass to CompositorConfig.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-moderate integration task with clear defaults and testing for value flow-through.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) All pytest files (timeline, editor, renderers, compositor integration); 2) Technical docs (editor/renderers) + index/ai-context updates.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate from broad test coverage across 10+ components plus multi-doc creation. Ensures regression protection for complex effects system.
